description: Andretti Acquisition Corp. II does not have significant operations. It focuses on effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Andretti Acquisition Corp. II was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Alpharetta, Georgia.
